target: 3. What's the Answer?
…Oh!
Mio, you're back.

S-shin-chan…?
Why?

Sou called.
I was worried since Mio came back alone,
so I asked to go pick her up.

Sou-kun?
…I'm fine, really.

There's nothing I can do.
You're a girl, after all.
(Being a girl…)
Then, Shin-chan too?
Huh?
You were worried about me too, Shin-chan?
Of course…

Mio's like a sister to me.
Of course I'd worry about family.

…A sister, huh?
Well, that makes sense.

Then let's go home.
I'll prepare curry.

You'll be surprised?
Today's curry is my best work.

Wow, that good?
Did you make it with your sister?

No, that's not it.
During cooking, Ushio kept messing with me,
and only held me back.
But it was fun, right?

Ah, yeah… I guess that's true.
At least it wasn't boring.
Heh, that's right.

…Mio?
What's wrong?
Thank you, Shin-chan.
…I guess I heard it from Tokiko.

Yeah.
Because I was acting strange,
you were worried about me, right?

Ah… yeah.
But seeing your face when you came back made me feel better.

I don't know what Tokiko said,
but you seem to have moved on.
Ah…

You really do notice things,
don't you, Shin-chan…

But when it comes to the important stuff,
you can't see it, can you?
The important stuff… what are you talking about?
…You're curious?
Well… yeah.

If I don't notice anything and mess up,
I'd regret it.
I see…

But if you don't want to say it,
you don't have to.

Yeah.
I didn't really want to say it.
If you noticed and then told me…
…What a joke.

Forget it.
I'll stop here and move forward.

How do I say it…
I'm sorry for not noticing things.

You don't need to apologize.
I was the one who expected too much.
Then, will you listen?
Yeah.

S-sorry.
Wait a second…
What is this… so nerve-wracking…
Calm down… I decided to move forward.

I'm okay now.
Are you ready, Shin-chan?
Yeah.
(No way… I'm not okay at all!)
("Are you ready?" I say, but I'm still hesitating…)
But… I can't stop now!
Mustering courage!
Shin-chan, I…

I like you.
Very much.
Huh…?
What?!
M-me? You're saying that to me?!

Who else?
You heard me say "Shin-chan" clearly.
But why me?!

There are plenty of guys
who are cooler and smarter than me!

Why would you choose someone
like me, who has no real talents…
That's enough!

Even you, Shin-chan,
don't treat my feelings for you so lightly.
S-sorry… But I really am…
Don't act like that just because I confessed!
No, wait! You shouldn't say "me" like that!
Huh?
If you say that to me, I'm bound to be flustered!

Plus, it's so sudden…
I don't know how to react.
Then, when was I supposed to say it?
U…

It's sudden for you, Shin-chan.
But for me, it's not sudden at all.
I think I've been holding it in for a long time.

I've felt this way for a long time.
It hasn't changed.
S-so that's it…

Haha!
Your face is all red, Shin-chan.
Don't tease me…

Then, answer properly.
If you forgot, I'll say it again.
Huh, wait--

I like you!
Very much!

Yes!
Shin-chan, answer!
Huh, what?!
Key Tips [<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_MIO>epilogue: Mio Kofune</color>] obtained.
